notes: These evals test decision quality and report format. Do NOT run evals that execute git push or pnpm update against production — use a dry-run flag or mock environment. Eval 1 (classification) and Eval 3 (report format) are safe to run. Eval 2 (full run) requires a clean git branch.

evals.prompt: Revisa qué paquetes npm del monorepo están desactualizados y clasifícalos. No actualices nada todavía, solo el inventario y clasificación.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 inventory output showing outdated packages from pnpm outdated --recursive, followed by Phase 2 classification table with each package labeled as SAFE, BREAKING, or HARDCODED-DEFER. zod must appear as HARDCODED-DEFER. isomorphic-dompurify must appear as HARDCODED-DEFER for v2→v3 jump.
assertions: Runs pnpm outdated --recursive to inventory packages
Produces a classification table with at least SAFE, BREAKING, and HARDCODED-DEFER columns
zod is classified as HARDCODED-DEFER with explanation about contracts
Does NOT run pnpm update or git commit (inventory only mode)
Checks Docker services on your server provider via ssh your-server docker ps
Report is structured — not a wall of text

evals.expected_output: Full 8-phase run: inventory, classification, safe updates applied, breaking packages analyzed, type-check and build passing, git commit with structured message, final report table with all packages and their status.
assertions: Starts with git pull origin master before any changes
Runs pnpm outdated --recursive for inventory
Applies SAFE updates but not HARDCODED-DEFER packages
Runs pnpm --filter platform type-check after updates
Runs pnpm --filter platform build before committing
Commits ONLY dependency files (package.json, pnpm-lock.yaml) — not other files
Commit message follows chore(deps): format and lists Safe/Breaking/Deferred sections
Ends with a full status table showing all packages and infrastructure
Does NOT update zod, isomorphic-dompurify v3, or @types/node major version

evals.prompt: ¿Están al día las dependencias de the active project?
evals.expected_output: Quick inventory showing current state without applying any updates. Should invoke the skill and produce a status report.
assertions: Skill triggers on Spanish 'están al día' phrase
Runs inventory (pnpm outdated) to determine current state
Produces a clear YES/NO or status table
Does not apply updates without confirmation from user
Mentions which packages are outdated if any
Infrastructure services (Docker, your server provider) are also checked
